author: gb9t
content: Iter 83 result: drivers/md/dm-stats.md (per-target IO statistics - dm-stats.c ~1264 lines; per-target DmStats with multiple stats-areas + per-area DmStat covering [start,end] step regions + per-CPU DmStatPercpu counters (sectors/ios/merges/ticks/time_in_queue) + optional per-bin latency histogram + precise_timestamps + per-cgroup integration + dmsetup message protocol @stats_create/_delete/_clear/_print) + virt/kvm/x86-mca.md (KVM Machine-Check Architecture - in x86.c ~200-300 lines; per-vCPU mcg_cap with bank-count + features (MCG_CTL_P/EXT_P/CMCI_P/TES_P/LMCE_P) + per-bank MSR_IA32_MCx_CTL/_STATUS/_ADDR/_MISC/_CTL2 + KVM_X86_SETUP_MCE ioctl + KVM_X86_SET_MCE inject + LMCE local-MCE + CMCI corrected-IRQ + #MC vector inject). 116 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-verity.md (FS-verity-on-block authenticated read) + virt/kvm/x86-msr.md (MSR auto-load/store list + MSR pass-through deep-dive).
